parsed.reason: The rationale is vague and circular. It essentially restates that this is a "private message about a relationship conflict" without explaining WHY this should be classified as "unclassified" or what specific criteria make it not warrant family-wide action. The rationale doesn't address the actual content (teen emotional distress, relationship breakdown, avoidance of parental communication) or explain what event type this actually represents. A stronger rationale would explicitly define what "unclassified" means in this context or clearly explain why the emotional distress and parent-avoidance behavior don't trigger a particular event category.
